race.comment: HEY DAISY (2) just missed at Eagle Farm in a CL3 on slow and then raced a $2.7F in a CL2 at the Sunshine Coast and didn't manage the heavy track. Peaks and has been freshened up. She's well-placed to win a country 58. BOOM BREAK (1) has been kept fresh and led and placed at the Gold Coast last time. Has a handy 3kg claim and should be in the finish. ZEDARI (3) led at Taree first-up and found one better in a CL2. The 2kg claim takes care of most of the weight rise and with the extra fitness has claims. HAYLEY'S ROCKET (9) resumes and has trialled well at Ballina. He didn't miss by too far at Grafton on debut and missed a whisker there when last seen. Has to be kept well onside.
